```python
import numpy as np

def place_odcs(instance, n_active):
    # Inicialização
    n_clients, n_sites = instance.n_clients, instance.n_sites
    distances = instance.distances
    client_demand = instance.client_demand
    max_distance = instance.max_distance
    max_capacity = instance.max_capacity

    # Ordem dos sites pela demanda de CPU atribuída
    site_demands = np.sum(np.where(distances == distances.min(axis=1)[:, np.newaxis], client_demand[:, np.newaxis], 0), axis=0)
    site_indices = np.argsort(-site_demands)

    # Seleção dos sites
    selected_sites = []
    remaining_clients = np.arange(n_clients)
    while remaining_clients.size > 0 and len(selected_sites) < n_active:
        # Seleção do próximo site
        next_site = site_indices[len(selected_sites)]
        selected_sites.append(next_site)

        # Atualização dos clientes atendidos
        client_distances = distances[remaining_clients, next_site]
        new_client_mask = client_distances <= max_distance
        new_clients = remaining_clients[new_client_mask]
        remaining_clients = remaining_clients[~new_client_mask]

        # Verificação da capacidade
        if np.sum(client_demand[new_clients]) > max_capacity:
            # Se a capacidade for excedida, remover clientes com maior demanda
            sorted_clients = np.argsort(-client_demand[new_clients])
            sorted_demands = np.cumsum(client_demand[new_clients[sorted_clients]])
            within_capacity = sorted_demands <= max_capacity
            if not np.any(within_capacity):
                # Se nenhum cliente puder ser atendido, remover o site selecionado
                selected_sites.pop()
                continue
            new_clients = new_clients[sorted_clients[within_capacity]]

    # Verificação da viabilidade
    sub = distances[:, selected_sites]
    nearest_idx = sub.argmin(axis=1)
    nearest_dist = sub.min(axis=1)
    load = np.zeros(len(selected_sites))
    np.add.at(load, nearest_idx, instance.client_demand)
    if load.max() > max_capacity or nearest_dist.max() > max_distance:
        # Se a solução não for viável, remover sites até que seja viável
        while load.max() > max_capacity or nearest_dist.max() > max_distance:
            # Remover o site com a menor demanda
            site_demands = np.sum(np.where(sub == sub.min(axis=1)[:, np.newaxis], client_demand[:, np.newaxis], 0), axis=0)
            remove_site = np.argmin(site_demands)
            selected_sites.pop(remove_site)
            sub = distances[:, selected_sites]
            nearest_idx = sub.argmin(axis=1)
            nearest_dist = sub.min(axis=1)
            load = np.zeros(len(selected_sites))
            np.add.at(load, nearest_idx, instance.client_demand)

    return selected_sites
```
